scripts.typecheck: yarn workspace @datalog/parser build && yarn workspace @datalog/datalog-to-sql build && yarn workspace @datalog/datalog-migrate build && tsc -p ./tsconfig.spec.json --noEmit
scripts.test: yarn workspace @datalog/parser build && yarn workspace @datalog/datalog-to-sql build && yarn workspace @datalog/datalog-migrate build && vitest run --config ./vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:worker-collision-proof: yarn workspace @datalog/parser build && yarn workspace @datalog/datalog-to-sql build && yarn workspace @datalog/datalog-migrate build && MEDICAL_ONTOLOGY_E2E_RUN_WORKER_COLLISION_PROOF=1 vitest run --config ./vitest.config.ts --maxWorkers=2 test/localhost-postgres-fixture-worker-a.test.ts test/localhost-postgres-fixture-worker-b.test.ts
